commands.command: uv run --python 3.11 python -m py_compile engine/strategy_admission_statistical_gate.py engine/strategy_admission_package.py engine/mature_multifactor_research.py

uv run --python 3.11 python -c 'from engine.strategy_admission_statistical_gate import MultipleTestingReport, validate_multiple_testing_report; r=MultipleTestingReport(family_id="cr151-factor-family", candidate_count=3, raw_p_values=(0.01,), adjusted_p_values=(0.02,), alpha=0.05, method="BH", rejected_count=4); print("issue_codes=" + ",".join(issue.code for issue in validate_multiple_testing_report(r)))'

uv run --python 3.11 python -c 'from engine.strategy_admission_statistical_gate import BacktestOverfitRiskReport, MultipleTestingReport, RobustFactorStatisticsReport, WalkForwardValidationPlan, evaluate_strategy_admission_statistical_gate; gate=evaluate_strategy_admission_statistical_gate(multiple_testing_report=MultipleTestingReport(family_id="cr151-factor-family", candidate_count=3, raw_p_values=(0.01,), adjusted_p_values=(0.02,), alpha=0.05, method="BH", rejected_count=1), robust_statistics_report=RobustFactorStatisticsReport(metric_id="rank_ic", sample_count=64, ic_mean=0.035, rank_ic_mean=0.042, robust_t_stat=2.4, p_value=0.02, autocorrelation_lags=(1,5,10)), walk_forward_plan=WalkForwardValidationPlan(folds=3, train_window="504d", validation_window="126d", oos_window="63d", embargo_days=5, fold_metrics=({"fold_id":1,"passed":True},{"fold_id":2,"passed":True},{"fold_id":3,"passed":True})), overfit_risk_report=BacktestOverfitRiskReport(trial_count=12, pbo=0.12, dsr=0.45, observed_sharpe=1.25, skew=0.1, kurtosis=3.1, sample_length=756)); print("gate_status=" + gate.status.value); print("issue_codes=" + ",".join(issue.code for issue in gate.blocked_reasons))'

uv run --python 3.11 python -c 'from engine.strategy_admission_statistical_gate import BacktestOverfitRiskReport, MultipleTestingReport, RobustFactorStatisticsReport, WalkForwardValidationPlan, evaluate_strategy_admission_statistical_gate; base=dict(multiple_testing_report=MultipleTestingReport("ok",1,(0.01,),(0.01,),0.05,"BH",1), robust_statistics_report=RobustFactorStatisticsReport("rank_ic",64,0.03,0.04,2.4,0.02,(1,5,10)), walk_forward_plan=WalkForwardValidationPlan(3,"504d","126d","63d",5,({"passed":True},{"passed":True},{"passed":True})), overfit_risk_report=BacktestOverfitRiskReport(12,0.12,0.45,1.25,0.1,3.1,756)); print("status_order=" + ",".join(evaluate_strategy_admission_statistical_gate(operation_counts=counts, **base).status.value for counts in ({"broker_access":1},{},)))'
commands.summary: status_order=BLOCKED,PASS; forbidden operation counters remain fail-closed before PASS

dangerous_command_scan.summary: No CR151-introduced executable runtime/data/credential/NAS/provider/QMT/trading/Git remote operation was found or executed. Static hits in mature_multifactor_research.py are pre-existing IO helpers outside the CR151 completion-map path and were not invoked.

findings.title: Multiple-testing count consistency is not validated, allowing malformed evidence to PASS
findings.reproduction: candidate_count=3 with one raw and one adjusted p-value returns validate_multiple_testing_report(...) == () and aggregate gate status PASS
findings.recommended_fix: Validate candidate_count == len(raw_p_values) == len(adjusted_p_values) and rejected_count <= candidate_count; malformed count evidence should produce blocker issues and aggregate BLOCKED before threshold evaluation.
findings.closure_summary: Reverification shows count mismatch blocker issue codes and aggregate malformed multiple-testing evidence returns BLOCKED.

closed_risks.summary: CP7 verify packets were updated to include acceptance_criteria, non-empty verification_plan, test_refs, design_contract_refs and design_evidence_ref.
Canonical docs/quality/TEST-STRATEGY.md now covers CR151 static-only verification strategy and release boundary.

process_hygiene.notes: R01 and R02 are remediated before CP8; STATE v2 hygiene remains for release readiness caveat.
